title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Tokenized asset market tops $43B as institutions accelerate blockchain adoption
summary: Tokenized financial assets have surged 37% in six months as institutions expand blockchain adoption and the market broadens beyond funds and private credit, according to Token Terminal.

title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
summary: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

title: ChatGPT Is Still Huge, But Rival AI Chatbots Are Catching Up Fast
summary: Sensor Tower's State of AI 2026 report shows ChatGPT's audience share slipping below 50% for the first time, as Gemini's default-app advantage and Claude's Pentagon-fueled rally eat into OpenAI's lead.

title: Coinbase Gears Up to Launch Tokenized Stock Trading, Crypto and Equities Options
summary: Publicly traded crypto exchange Coinbase added to its feature set Tuesday as it seeks to become the "everything exchange."

title: SpaceX Shares Hit New High as Elon Musk's Firm Agrees to Acquire AI Startup Cursor for $60 Billion
summary: The all-stock deal would make Cursor a wholly owned SpaceX subsidiary and deepen the company's push into AI following its blockbuster IPO.

title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration

title: Payments startup Flutterwave hits $3.2B valuation, backed by Ripple
summary: African payments infrastructure company Flutterwave has hit a new valuation and landed blockchain company Ripple as an investor and partner.

title: SpaceX’s debut: A win for crypto price discovery, a fail for tokenized access
summary: SpaceX’s blockbuster debut didn’t just mint a trillionaire; it became a real-world stress test for crypto’s promise of democratized market access.

title: SpaceX to acquire Cursor for $60B in stock, days after blockbuster IPO
summary: The deal is supposed to help SpaceX's struggling AI division. The company told IPO investors it sees a $26 trillion addressable market in AI.

title: Elon Musk Loses Again to OpenAI as Judge Dismisses xAI Trade Secret Lawsuit
summary: A federal judge handed Elon Musk his second defeat against OpenAI after finding xAI failed to show OpenAI improperly obtained confidential info.

title: Wall Street Could Boost Uniswap's Token Price Nearly 40x by 2030: Standard Chartered
summary: Uniswap’s native token UNI is set to surge nearly fortyfold in the coming years as Wall Street migrates on-chain, Standard Chartered said.

title: Anthropic Faces Lawsuit Over Allegedly Misleading Claude AI Pricing
summary: A class action lawsuit alleges Anthropic overstated the usage limits of its Claude Max subscription plans and misled customers about savings.
